item.title: Spring Home Maintenance Checklist Every Homeowner Should Follow
item.description: Winter leaves behind more than muddy boots. Use this spring home maintenance checklist to spot issues early, prevent big repairs, and keep your home running smoothly.

item.title: 10 Home Upgrades That Increase Property Value
item.description: Not every home upgrade pays off. After years in the industry, I know which improvements boost value—and which ones just empty your wallet. Here are the projects that actually move the needle when it’s time to sell.

item.title: How to Create a Low-Maintenance Backyard
item.description: Ditch the endless chores. Learn how to design a low-maintenance backyard with the right plants, materials, and smart strategies for a stress-free outdoor space.

item.title: Simple Ways to Lower Your Home Energy Bills
item.description: Slash your utility bills with targeted tips: seal drafts, fix insulation, update lighting, and more. These practical, specific steps can make a real dent in your home energy costs.
